category_title: Students with Intellectual Disability (ID) receiving individualized support in inclusive settings
scenario_title: Social isolation due to over-support in co-taught settings
minimal_context: The student is assigned a mainstream classroom worksheet activity while the Special Education Teacher provides direct one-on-one support.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The class is starting the mainstream worksheet activity. I am going to sit right here with you so we can do it one-on-one.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know how to do it by myself.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: That's good. Let's just do the first problem together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Watches the peers at the next table working together, but stays silent and completely isolated from them)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Focus on your own paper. What is the answer to number one?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the desk away, throws the pencil on the floor, and crosses arms, acting out while the general education teacher continues teaching the rest of the class)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: The class is starting the mainstream worksheet activity. I am going to sit right here with you so we can do it one-on-one.

STUDENT: I know how to do it by myself.

TUTOR: That's good. Let's just do the first problem together.

STUDENT: (Watches the peers at the next table working together, but stays silent and completely isolated from them)

TUTOR: Focus on your own paper. What is the answer to number one?

STUDENT: (Pushes the desk away, throws the pencil on the floor, and crosses arms, acting out while the general education teacher continues teaching the rest of the class)

context.social_setting: individual teaching to students with SEN by the SET

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: frequent implementation of individual teaching to students with SEN by the SET, even in cases where the child could independently complete the activities
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: decreased interactions between students with SEN and their peers
related_quotes: decreased interactions between students with SEN and their peers in co-taught settings

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: problem behaviours dealt with exclusively by the SET
related_quotes: SET was the one dealing with their problem behaviours when both teachers were present
